name: Stripe Webhook Test Kit v0.1
tagline: Fire real-shape signed Stripe events at your local webhook endpoint and prove your handler behaves. Stdlib only. No account, no dependencies.
description: Catches the four checkout-webhook gotchas that ship to production: null buyer email, forged events accepted, broken success_url, replayable requests. Ships swtk.py + swtk.js, real-shape fixtures with provenance, an HTTP-layer test suite, and GOTCHAS.md. Python 3.8+ or Node 14+; no Stripe account needed.

name: Membership-Site Boilerplate Kit v0.2
tagline: Stdlib-only Python starter for paid memberships: checkout → webhook → grant → gated access, pre-wired, tested against real-shape Stripe payloads over HTTP. Mock mode by default: zero accounts.
description: A complete membership flow you don't have to wire yourself: 36 bundled tests, native Stripe-Signature verification, and it fails closed. Mock mode by default means you can run the whole flow with zero accounts.
status_note: Publish click queued to the owner — not yet purchasable.

name: Agent-Workflow Template Pack v0.1
tagline: A drop-in Markdown + shell scaffold for agent-session discipline: constitution, session-log card, one-page playbook, and three advisory (fail-open) Claude Code hooks. No deps, no runtime.
description: The working agreements a disciplined agent session runs on, packaged: a constitution template, a session-log card, a one-page playbook, and three advisory hooks that warn without ever blocking. Drop it into any repo — no dependencies, no runtime.
status_note: Publish click queued to the owner — not yet purchasable.

name: Agent Fleet Field Manual v0.1
tagline: The scar tissue of running an agent fleet, written down and cited to real artifacts — so your fleet stops manufacturing confident, unverified claims.
description: Eleven chapters of field-tested practice for running a fleet of coding agents, every claim cited to a real artifact. Includes two free sample chapters and three templates.
status_note: Publish click queued to the owner — not yet purchasable.
